(00:30) No Huddle-Shotgun #2 B.Davidson pass incomplete short left to #6 D.Rogers thrown to TOLEDO03, TURNOVER ON DOWNS
(00:25) No Huddle-Shotgun #20 S.Simeon rush right for 10 yards gain to the TOLEDO18 (#44 M.Canion), 1ST DOWN
End of 4th quarter.
